title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 28 Junior Resident Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) has recently published the official notification for the recruitment of 28 Junior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have completed their MBBS can use this opportunity and apply for the AIIMS Gorakhpur Notification 2026 . Here we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the wal...
